programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Kim Kovan and Fiona Austen have been firm friends and business partners for 15 years, running an internet business from the ground floor of Kym's commercial/residential premises. Life was good, until last year when Kym had a shock diagnosis - motor neurone disease. The condition is terminal, so to make the most of the time she has left, she and Fiona purchased a country retreat in Taree. They put Hurlstone Park on the market to fund the move, but six months later still no buyer, and as each day passes Kym's health declines. But it's no straightforward sale. Aside from the place being half shop, half house, the building has serious structural issues. Can the team straighten this one out and push it over the line?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: When Greg and Hannah bought a bowling alley, it wasn't the lucrative business they had dreamed. They are desperate to sell their home to cover their debts, but it is so run-down no buyer will touch it.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: From deep underground, to high on a bushfire-prone mountain top, Grand Designs Series 10B is a testament to the lengths, depths and heights some of Australia's most ambitious and passionate home owners will strive for to realise their dreams. From shipping containers, to dugouts, a 100 year old hat factory, to a solid concrete bunker, this season sees homeowners push the limits in their quest to find clever design solutions in some of the most extreme environments on the planet. From the soaring temperatures of Coober Pedy, to the windswept coastline of South Australia's Fleurieu Peninsula; the surfer paradise of Torquay, Victoria, to Sydney's bustling inner city hotspot of Newtown; host Peter Maddison goes on a journey of discovery, surprise and some trepidation with some of Australia's boldest architectural trailblazers. Astounding designs, innovative materials, inspired solutions in some of the best locations in the country. Grand Designs Australia Series 10 - you haven't seen anything like it.

programme.desc: Experts from leading auction houses tour towns across the UK, valuing treasured items brought in by members of the public.

Meanwhile, Charlie visits Newark Air Museum to learn about The Royal Observer Corps.

programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: Bogart: Life Comes in Flashes
programme.desc: Filmmaker Kathryn Ferguson explores the remarkable life and legacy of Hollywood legend and cultural icon Humphrey Bogart, narrated in his own words.

programme.desc: The true story of the wild school boy Rich Jenkins, son of a boozy miner, and the English teacher who recognised his talent, Philip Burton.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: Drop
programme.desc: A widowed mother's first date in years turns terrifying when she receives anonymous threats during dinner, making her question if her charming date is behind the harassment.

programme.desc: A deeply personal documentary exploring life at its most fragile, following individuals confronting mortality, belief and healing at the edge of life and death. Doctors use psilocybin to help terminally ill patients, discovering ancient wisdom on death and traditional medicines during their Amazon journey.

programme.title: Honey Don't!
programme.desc: Small-town private investigator Honey O'Donahue probes a series of strange deaths that are tied to a mysterious church.

programme.title: Kissing Is The Easy Part

programme.title: Sacramento
programme.desc: Free-spirited Rickey, clinging to his Peter Pan ways, convinces his settled friend Glenn to pause domestic life for an unplanned road trip across California.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight
programme.desc: Top assassins battle in a brutal underground tournament, but a rogue crew aims to survive, outsmart the killers, and bring down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Rumours
programme.desc: Leaders of the wealthiest democracies face absurd challenges as night falls in misty woods, realising they are suddenly alone and struggling with their incompetence.

programme.title: September 5

programme.desc: A soldier searches for his missing wife, infiltrating a facility he believes is tied to trafficking, only to find it's a futuristic park blurring reality and illusion.

Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: M3gan 2.0

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.desc: About to embark on a world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her past.

programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic becomes entangled in a web of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Mr Burton
programme.desc: The true story of the wild school boy Rich Jenkins, son of a boozy miner, and the English teacher who recognised his talent, Philip Burton.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

Its first target is a single mum who knows she's in trouble when flowing pink slime contaminates her toddler's stroller. Who's she gonna call?

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history ... while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Ned Kelly
programme.desc: You can kill a man but not a legend. Ned Kelly and his brother Dan, sons of an Irish pig thief exiled to the Australian penal colony in 1843, formed the core of the Kelly Gang (with two other men), an outlaw gang that roamed across Australia for over two wild years. Kelly was a clever bandit, making his own homemade armour, including steel chest plates and helmets, to stop bullets from stopping him. Kelly was first arrested at 16 for horse stealing, but he became an outlaw when he killed a police officer who was harassing his brother.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
programme.desc: In an alternate world, the murder of a government sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement, into a mystery that threatens their lives and the world itself.

programme.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
programme.desc: Former heroes face threats. The Comedian is dead, Dr. Manhattan exiled to Mars, Ozymandias survived an attack and Rorschach is arrested.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night, until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: The Bad Guys
programme.desc: The Bad Guys are the most notorious criminals in the world, pulling off a lifetime of legendary heists, but can the gang of misfits pull off their biggest job yet: going good?

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. Whether regarded as thief or hero, one man from humble beginnings will become an eternal symbol of freedom for his people.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: Capitol Policeman John Cale has just been denied his dream job with the Secret Service of protecting President James Sawyer. Not wanting to let down his little girl with the news, he takes her on a tour of the White House, during which the complex is overtaken by a heavily armed paramilitary group. Now, with the nation's government falling into chaos and time running out, it's up to Cale to save the president, his daughter, and the country.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Barb Wire
programme.desc: Baywatch babe Pamela Anderson squeezes into a fetching black leather outfit to become the fiery Barb Wire, a sassy comic book hero who fights against injustice in the United States of 2017. Barb, a bar owner/mercenary, is persuaded to help her former lover in the fight against the fascist dictatorship now in control of the country.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: The Land Before Time XIV
programme.desc: Littlefoot and friends set out to find his father who hasn't returned from an important journey.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn Carnahan discover the lost city of Hamunaptra, and struggle to save the world from unspeakable evil after they inadvertently stumble upon a mummy's tomb in 1923, and the mummy is accidentally resurrected.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected in the British Museum, the mummy walks the Earth once more, determined to fulfil his quest for immortality. An even more powerful force born of the darkest rituals of ancient Egypt has also been set loose in the world. When these two forces clash, the fate of the world will hang in the balance, sending the O'Connells on a desperate race to save the world.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Set in ancient China, a mercenary travels east in search of gunpowder and discovers the mighty Great Wall and the terrible secret behind why it was built.

programme.title: Dragonheart
programme.desc: Long ago, when majestic fire-breathers soared through the skies, there lived a knight who would come face-to-face and heart-to-heart with the most remarkable creature that ever existed.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In this prequel to the blockbuster Mummy films, a mercenary is hired by a dissident alliance to kill the beautiful sorceress Cassandra, from whom the brutal tyrant Memnon draws his strength. Once Cassandra is removed the alliance plans to face Memnon's armies on their own terms, but the sorceress is not all she seems in this swirling, CGI-laden romp.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: Shaun of the Dead
programme.desc: Get ready for a gut-busting, bone-mashing good time in this hilarious horror comedy. There comes a day in every man's life when he has to get off the couch and kill some zombies. When flesh-eating zombies are on the hunt for a bite to eat, it's up to slacker Shaun and his best pal to save their friends and family from becoming the next entree.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: Lyle, Lyle, Crocodile
programme.desc: When the Primm family moves to New York City, their young son Josh struggles to adapt to his new school and new friends. All of that changes when he discovers Lyle - a singing crocodile who loves baths, caviar and great music-living in the attic of his new home. The two become fast friends, but when Lyle's existence is threatened by evil neighbour Mr. Grumps, the Primms must band together with Lyle's charismatic owner, Hector P. Valenti, to show the world that family can come from the most unexpected places and there's nothing wrong with a big singing crocodile with an even bigger personality.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Dragonheart
programme.desc: Long ago, when majestic fire-breathers soared through the skies, there lived a knight who would come face-to-face and heart-to-heart with the most remarkable creature that ever existed.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Desperate to find their missing son, Paul and his wife Amanda trick eminent palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant into accompanying them to Isla Sorna. The small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Set in ancient China, a mercenary travels east in search of gunpowder and discovers the mighty Great Wall and the terrible secret behind why it was built.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Travel back to the stone-age in this big-budget treatment of the world's favourite prehistoric family! Fred Flintstone, a put-upon blue-collar worker struggling to squeak by, with the help of his best buddy Barney and his wife Wilma. After an aptitude test mix up, Fred Flintstone trades his job as Slate & Company Bronto-crane operator for a vice presidency. But there's trouble brewing in Bedrock: An evil executive and his sinister secretary are now plotting to use Fred as the fall guy in an embezzlement scheme!

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Zora Bennett leads a team to a deadly island lab to retrieve dinosaur DNA with life-saving potential, but they uncover a shocking secret buried for decades.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: When a powerful threat looms over Berk, Hiccup and his dragon Toothless must lead Vikings and dragons toward a united future before everything they know is lost.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives. Welcome to the most astonishing chapter of one of the most beloved animated franchises in film history: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World. Now chief and ruler of Berk alongside Astrid, Hiccup has created a gloriously chaotic dragon utopia. When the sudden appearance of a female Light Fury coincides with the darkest threat their village has ever faced, Hiccup and Toothless must leave the only home they've known and journey to a hidden world thought only to exist in myth. As their true destines are revealed, dragon and rider will fight together - to the very ends of the Earth - to protect everything they've grown to treasure.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale and director Terri Flores, ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilisation. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide, who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The O'Connells must stop a mummy awoken from a 2000-year-old curse who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless, unending service. Doomed by a wronged sorceress, Zi Yuan, to spend eternity in suspended animation, the ruthless Dragon Emperor and his 10,000 warriors have laid forgotten for eons, entombed in clay as a vast, silent Terracotta Army.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: The Land Before Time
programme.desc: Join Littlefoot, Cera, Spike, Ducky and Petrie on their first journey together to find the lush, legendary Great Valley. Along the way, the prehistoric pals overcome many challenges and learn the value of teamwork and friendship.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Mack is tired of doing all the things she has to do to keep up with her friends and become successful in her 30s. Her deepest wish is to be an older woman so she can just chill out and wear a good chunky sweater. But when she's struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod at Coachella and becomes Rita, a 65-year-old woman, Mack learns that the reality of being an older age isn't quite what she imagined.

programme.title: More Sex & the Single Mom
programme.desc: A woman's life turns chaotic when her ex-lover returns and her daughter becomes infatuated with an older man.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: After breaking up with Mark Darcy, Bridget Jones's "happily ever after" hasn't quite gone according to plan. Fortysomething and single again, she decides to focus on her job as top news producer and surround herself with old friends and new. For once, Bridget has everything completely under control. What could possibly go wrong? Then her love life takes a turn and Bridget meets a dashing American named Jack, the suitor who is everything Mr. Darcy is not. In an unlikely twist she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch she can only be fifty percent sure of the identity of her baby's father.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Mack is tired of doing all the things she has to do to keep up with her friends and become successful in her 30s. Her deepest wish is to be an older woman so she can just chill out and wear a good chunky sweater. But when she's struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod at Coachella and becomes Rita, a 65-year-old woman, Mack learns that the reality of being an older age isn't quite what she imagined.

programme.title: More Sex & the Single Mom
programme.desc: A woman's life turns chaotic when her ex-lover returns and her daughter becomes infatuated with an older man.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way. From the director of Fast Times at Ridgemont High comes a 'teenagers save the world' comedy based loosely on Jane Austin's Emma, that elevated Alicia Silverstone from that Aerosmith girl to a star in the making.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty in Pink, comes this high-school romance starring Eric Stoltz as a misfit whose crush on a teen queen takes him on a voyage of self discovery. Keith (Stoltz) thinks he is in love with Amanda (Lea Thompson) while tomboy Watts (Mary Stuart Masterson) pines for Keith. Meanwhile, Amanda wishes she were loved by her current boyfriend, Hardy Jenns ( Craig Sheffer), whilst Hardy is only in love with himself.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. Upon initiating it, he is delighted to meet "Samantha", a bright, female voice, who is insightful, sensitive and surprisingly funny. As her needs and desires grow, in tandem with his own, their friendship deepens into an eventual love for each other. An original love story that explores the evolving nature - and the risks - of intimacy in the modern world.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way. From the director of Fast Times at Ridgemont High comes a 'teenagers save the world' comedy based loosely on Jane Austin's Emma, that elevated Alicia Silverstone from that Aerosmith girl to a star in the making.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Minnie and Quinn are born on the same day, one minute apart. Their lives may begin together, but their worlds couldn't be more different. Years later they find themselves together again. Maybe it's time to take a chance on love.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? One million dollars, no questions asked - one night with Diana, nothing more.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: At the age of 21, Tim Lake discovers he can travel in time. The night after another unsatisfactory New Year party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. Tim can't change history, but he can change what happens and has happened in his own life - so he decides to make his world a better place by getting a girlfriend. Sadly, that turns out not to be as easy as you might think. Moving from the Cornwall coast to London to train as a lawyer, Tim finally meets the beautiful but insecure Mary. They fall in love, then an unfortunate time-travel incident means he's never met her at all. So they meet for the first time again-and again-but finally, after a lot of cunning time-traveling, he wins her heart. Tim then uses his power to create the perfect romantic proposal, to save his wedding from the worst best-man speeches, to save his best friend from professional disaster and to get his pregnant wife to the hospital in time for the birth of their daughter, despite a nasty traffic jam outside Abbey Road. But as his unusual life progresses, Tim finds out that his unique gift can't save him from the sorrows and ups and downs that affect all families, everywhere. There are great limits to what time travel can achieve, and it can be dangerous too. This is a comedy about love and time travel, which discovers that, in the end, making the most of life may not need time travel at all.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Angry Angel
programme.desc: Allison Pyke is a young angel who's trying to get her ticket into heaven. Complications arise when two important men in her life unexpectedly show up to form a love triangle.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: After George is downsized from his financial firm and Linda's depressing documentary is cancelled, they can no longer afford their overpriced 'micro-loft' in New York. They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: In one of the most surprising and unusual love stories, directed by Adrian Lyne, Robert Redford and Woody Harrelson star with Demi Moore in this sizzling, controversial exploration of modern love and morality where a billionaire offers David one million dollars for one night with his wife, Diana. David and Diana Murphy can end their financial worries if they accept the offer of billionaire financier John Gage. But will David and Diana accept? If they do, can their marriage survive? They find themselves with just one option - to pack up their lives and head south to move in with George's brother and his wife. George and Linda stumble upon Elysium, an idyllic community where the only rule is to be yourself.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike balance their personal lives and busy careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding plans.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Will is a father who decides to tell his daughter the story of how he met her mother, when she starts asking questions about sex and relationships. Will discovers that a second look at the past might also give him a second chance at the future. It's definitely never too late to go back and maybe find a happy ending.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: A funny, inspiring and uplifting film about an art history professor with a lot to teach about life and much to learn about romance.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Mr Bennet is an English gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters; the beautiful Jane, the clever Elizabeth, the bookish Mary, the immature Kitty and the wild Lydia. Unfortunately for the Bennet's, if Mr Bennet dies their house will be inherited by a distant cousin whom they have never met, so the family's future happiness and security is dependent on the daughters making good marriages. Life is uneventful until the arrival in the neighbourhood of the rich gentleman Mr Bingley, who rents a large house so he can spend the summer in the country. Mr Bingley brings with him his two sisters and the dashing but proud Mr Darcy. Love is soon in the air for one of the Bennet sisters, while another may have jumped to a hasty prejudgment. For the Bennet sisters many trials and tribulations stand between them and their happiness, including class, gossip and scandal.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy family's chauffeur falls in love with one of their sons.

programme.title: The Story of Us
programme.desc: After 15 years of marriage, Ben is still the free-spirited person he's always been while Katie is left to handle life's messy little problems. So when the kids go off to summer camp, they face the most important decision of their married life. Do they end their story or begin a new chapter? From start to finish, this film gives us reason to laugh and cry in an entertaining outlook on marriage.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Mr Bennet is an English gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters; the beautiful Jane, the clever Elizabeth, the bookish Mary, the immature Kitty and the wild Lydia. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: Detective Nick Curran's investigation of a rock star's brutal murder leads him to glacial beauty and best-selling author Catherine Tramell. Despite Nick's entanglement with police psychologist Dr Beth Garner and the ever-present Roxy, Catherine's sultry and possessive girlfriend, the two begin a torrid affair. But when Nick discovers that Catherine's fictional, murderous storylines have a habit of coming true, he begins to wonder if his attraction to Catherine might turn out to be a fatal one.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: Hanna is a teenage girl. Uniquely, she has the strength, the stamina, and the smarts of a soldier; these come from being raised by her father, an ex-CIA man, in the wilds of Finland. Living a life unlike any other teenager, her upbringing and training have been one and the same, all geared to making her the perfect assassin. The turning point in her adolescence is a sharp one; sent into the world by her father on a mission, Hanna journeys stealthily across Europe while eluding agents dispatched after her by a ruthless intelligence operative with secrets of her own. As she nears her ultimate target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and unexpected questions about her humanity.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman is caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home. Now a hardworking life insurance salesman and a caring family man, the former police officer, Michael MacCauley, has taken the commuter rail to New York for the past ten years. But, unexpectedly, things will take a turn for the worse, when on one of his daily journeys, the cryptic passenger, Joanna, makes Michael a generous and tempting offer to locate a single commuter or face grave consequences. Is this a sick joke, or is this indeed a serious situation? As Michael races against the clock to solve this wicked conundrum, everyone aboard is a suspect, in a deal where there's definitely more than meets the eye. Can he decide in time who's the one?

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Sea Change
programme.desc: A small-town police chief (Tom Selleck) reopens a 12-year-old murder case while investigating a rape aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: Les Miserables (2012)
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of 19th-century France, this is the enthralling story of broken dreams and unrequited love, passion, sacrifice and redemption, and a timeless testament to the survival of the human spirit. Ex-prisoner Jean Valjean is hunted for decades by the ruthless policeman Javert after he breaks parole. When Valjean agrees to care for factory worker Fantine's young daughter, Cosette, their lives change forever.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: A Will To Kill
programme.desc: Ex-prosecutor Hailey Dean becomes a marriage counsellor and therapist. But, she gets caught up in a missing case and tries to solve the mystery surrounded by it to uncover the whole truth.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: No Remorse
programme.desc: Jesse, having been suspended by the local town council, moonlights for his friend, State Homicide Commander Healy by investigating a series of murders in Boston.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal 'The Cannibal' Lecter comes out of hiding to draw FBI agent Clarice Starling into a new high-stakes battle that will test her strength, cunning, and loyalty.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: In a tale of innocence lost and vengeance unleashed, four men plot retribution over their mistreatment in a violent reform school as boys.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: Mari Gilbert's search for her missing daughter, Shannan, uncovers the work of a serial killer on Long Island.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs - even the agents involved. Aaron Cross must use his genetically-engineered skills to survive the ultimate game of cat-and-mouse and finish what Jason Bourne started.

programme.title: The Craigslist Killer
programme.desc: Seemingly flawless medical student Philip Markoff leads a double life and starts to descend into a twisted world of gambling, crime, battery and eventually murder, all while meeting his victims through Craigslist.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old miner's son Billy Elliot is on his way to boxing lessons when he stumbles upon a ballet class. Billy secretly joins the class, knowing that his blue-collar family would never understand. Under the guidance of his teacher, Mrs Wilkinson, Billy's raw talent takes flight. When his father discovers his son's ambition, Billy must fight for his dreams and his destiny.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Will Graham is an expert investigator who quit the Bureau after almost losing his life in the process of capturing the elusive Dr Hannibal Lecter. Years later, after a series of particularly grisly murders, Graham reluctantly agrees to come out of retirement and assist in a mysterious case. But he soon realises that the best way to catch this killer, known as the Tooth Fairy, is to find a way to get inside the killer's mind.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Set in the south two years before the Civil War, a freed slave is on a mission to rescue his wife from the notorious Calvin Candie, the proprietor of Candyland, an infamous and brutal plantation.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea with two bullets in his back, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his violent past. Racing to unlock the secret of his own identity, he discovers the deadly truth: he's an elite government agent. To the government, Jason Bourne isn't just their property: he's a malfunctioning $30 million weapon. Lethally trained, built to disappear, he's an agent on the run who has to be taken out. Now, the government's top operative has become its No.1 target.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, Bourne has left his violent past behind and is living a normal life with girlfriend Marie. But his plans for a peaceful life are crushed when he narrowly escapes an assassination attempt. Now hunted by an unknown enemy, Bourne proves to be neither an easy target nor a person whose skill, determination and resilience can be underestimated.

programme.title: The Boxer
programme.desc: After being in prison for his involvement with the IRA, Danny Flynn re-opens a boxing ring in effort to heal his Belfast community, finding that a legacy of violence is not easily escaped.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks. Uncovering myriad and reprehensible illegal activities, Salinger and Whitman follow the money from Berlin to Milan to New York to Istanbul. Finding themselves in a high-stakes chase across the globe, their relentless tenacity puts their own lives at risk as their targets will stop at nothing, not even murder, to continue financing terror and war.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: A man fails a lie detector test and confesses to brutally murdering his pregnant wife Shan'ann and their two young daughters.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne resurfaces just as his former employers are implementing a new program aimed at hunting him down. Now fully recovered from his amnesia, Bourne teams up with Nicky Parsons to uncover the truth behind his father's death, while simultaneously exacting revenge and evading the government forces hot on his trail.

programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge and the Phantom ride into battle fighting the elements and taking damage. An old river boat nearly scuttles two truckers along the bumpy road to restoration.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. And, of course, they've confronted the deadly ice crossings that have tested their ability to survive. But now, as this program is in its landmark 11th season, a sense of urgency descends on the drivers. The roads are opening late and closing early. Every load could be the last one to make it up the trails. At any time, the roads could be shut down and tens of thousands of tons in freight won't be delivered. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever.

programme.title: Outback Car Hunters
programme.desc: A Ford Capri classic gets a head-turning makeover, and the boys finally get their hands on an Aussie country icon.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The locals of Louisiana who live in the swamps of the Atchafalaya River Basin face certain challenges as they hunt American alligators for their livelihood.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge and the Phantom ride into battle fighting the elements and taking damage. An old river boat nearly scuttles two truckers along the bumpy road to restoration.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Fort Worth, the trio uncovers a Gretsch White Penguin, a S&W revolver, and a Stan Lee, signed Wonder Man comic.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, where Darrell has had some of his biggest scores. Will he repeat or crash and burn? Meanwhile, Brandi learns that Jarrod is facing a problem that affects more than just their business.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: This season, we have the pleasure of welcoming Emily Wears, a 27-year-old auctioneer from Solon, Iowa. Emily has over 10 years of auctions under her belt and is trying to grow her business by branching out to the west coast. She turns heads with her uniqueness and immediately makes waves by dispensing with the usual "Going once! Going twice!" and selling the locker at her own pace. Emily gives us a taste of what this auction world looks like through the eyes of an outsider. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start; Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager (if unprepared) pupil; while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders this season is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put: Kenny is magic.

programme.title: Outback Car Hunters
programme.desc: A Ford Capri classic gets a head-turning makeover, and the boys finally get their hands on an Aussie country icon.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For over a decade, the drivers have battled it all from ferocious storms to freezing temperatures to bitter rivalries. It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge and the Phantom ride into battle fighting the elements and taking damage. An old river boat nearly scuttles two truckers along the bumpy road to restoration.

programme.title: Black Gold
programme.desc: The roughnecks of Big Dog 28 are on schedule to make their goal of 4 holes in 50 days, something no one thought could be done. But the third hole proves to be much harder than the first two. The crews dubb it: 'The Hole from Hell'. Pee Wee's Daylight Crew takes the brunt of the problems. Equipment fails, injuries slow the crew and tempers flare as hot as the west Texas sun. Pee Wee continues to struggle with Cheston. Even Gerald turns on the worm. Ron's Evening crew isn't immune to problems on the rig. He loses a good hand to another company and must break in a new guy who calls himself 'Tank'. But Tank's brawn is rendered unless when he forgets his boots on the first day. Things go from bad to worse when the drill pipe 'twists off' and drilling comes to a standstill. Then, it's a race to repair Big Dog 28 and with every passing minute the roughnecks get further from their goal of '4 in 50' and closer to losing their jobs.

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: The MythBusters delve into the shockwaves and the laws of motion, testing if an underwater explosion can be survived by diving deep; if an explosive wave can be surfed; if the design of a trench can help reduce a shockwave's deadly force; if a Newton's Cradle can be supersized with wrecking balls; if a two-car head-on crash is the same as crashing into a wall; and if a bullet impact can make you fly backwards.

It's a rush from day one and the mission is clear: pedal to the metal and never let up. The communities are counting on them now more than ever.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: In Providence, the team explores muscle cars, a John Adams book, and a harpoon gun.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Goodness, Gracious, Great Coats Of Fire
programme.desc: This season, we have the pleasure of welcoming Emily Wears, a 27-year-old auctioneer from Solon, Iowa. Emily has over 10 years of auctions under her belt and is trying to grow her business by branching out to the west coast. She turns heads with her uniqueness and immediately makes waves by dispensing with the usual "Going once! Going twice!" and selling the locker at her own pace. Emily gives us a taste of what this auction world looks like through the eyes of an outsider. On the buying end, we bring back the regulars: Dave Hester stirs things up from the start; Darrell Sheets shows off his recent weight loss and brings along an eager (if unprepared) pupil; while Brandi Passante and Jarrod Schulz, having sold their store, are forced to approach the business from a different angle. Rene Nezhoda hits the ground running, nailing a huge vintage video game locker and showing that he's still a major player. Ivy Calhoun keeps grinding, buying locker after locker, working economies of scale to his advantage. Mary Padian is as feisty as ever, holding her own against the competition. Rounding out the bidders this season is long-time fan favourite Kenny Crossley. This time, Kenny brings his unique hilarious twist as a bidder in his own right, catching the others off guard and putting on a show for the audience. Simply put: Kenny is magic. In this episode, Moreno Valley gives Darrell a chance to school his friend in daredevil-ing, and Dave's fortunes go up in flames. Then, Brandi and Jarrod dive back in - only they hit the bottom.

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: The MythBusters drop into the science of falling and rising, finding out if a skydiver can streamline like Keanu in Point Break; if a penny dropped from the Empire State Building could kill you; if jumping could help you survive an elevator accident; if paint - not hydrogen - caused the Hindenburg disaster; if a lead balloon could actually rise; and if party balloons could act as an airbag for a car of crashing clowns.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The hunters try new strategies when water levels plummet to unprecedented lows; Troy Landry launches a daring plan to bag 100 gators on the first day.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: While the team struggles to stop water from pouring into the Garden Shaft, the connection between Oak Island, Captain Phipps and The Knights Templar is rapidly intensifying on Lot 5.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: With a backlog of unsolved cases, Jake finds himself in a slump. Meanwhile, Amy is put in charge of the Junior Police Program for at risk kids, but her efforts to inspire them fall flat.

programme.title: MythBusters: There's Your Problem!
programme.desc: People and animals are the focus for the MythBusters as they delve into whether fear can really give you cold feet; if it's impossible to walk in a straight line while blindfolded; if flatulence can be fatal; if elephants are afraid of mice; if bloodhounds can be thrown off the scent; and if bulls really are attracted to red.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Comedians are set tasks challenging their creativity and wit. The tasks are supervised by Alex Horne but the Taskmaster, Greg Davies, always has the final word.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: The locals of Louisiana who live in the swamps of the Atchafalaya River Basin face certain challenges as they hunt American alligators for their livelihood.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on Earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant 18-wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub-zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: This vast island continent is home to some of the hardest places to reach on Earth. But for the mega trucks that keep the country moving, getting there is just another day at the office. Longer than a jet liner and heavier than a tank, they can run 24/7, pulling anything from houses to hamburgers. Behind the wheel are some of the best and toughest drivers in the world, their motto: anything, anytime, anywhere. Turbo embarks on a journey through an area affected by bush fires, and Yogi faces the biggest week of his career.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
